meta.title: S4x12 Mini-Keynote: No More Fragility
meta.description:
Dale Peterson introduces S4x12 and highlights two conflicting statements in ICS.

1. SCADA and DCS in the critical infrastructure can never go down. They must run 24x7x365.

2. SCADA and DCS are fragile and insecure. Don't scan them or they will crash.

What we have been doing for ten years has failed. We need new approaches and big goals.
